name: Comet Catcher
description: Tap glowing comets in a 3D starfield before the timer runs out.
features: Full-bleed 3D stage with a tappable comet that relocates on each hit
20-second round timer and a live score in the HUD
Game-over card shows the all-time leaderboard with the player's row highlighted
Confetti + win chime when the player tops the board

storage.meaning: the player's personal best round score

ui.layout: full-bleed 3D stage with a HUD overlay

acceptance: Tapping the comet increments the score and moves it to a new position
When the timer hits zero the round score is added to the scores counter
The game-over card lists counter('scores').top(10) with the player highlighted
A new top placement triggers confetti and sfx.win()
